title: roystonea lenis
intro: Roystonea lenis, also known as the Cuban royal palm, is a species of palm tree native to Cuba and the Isle of Youth. The plant's leaves and other parts have been used in traditional medicine, particularly for their antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The medicinal properties of Roystonea lenis are believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. The plant is sometimes used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to take advantage of its purported health benefits.
